name: n8n Ops
description: Ops-focused n8n tools for OpenClaw agents: list, inspect, trigger, validate, plus full workflow + execution lifecycle (create, save, archive, delete, cancel, retry) behind an edit flag. Auto-backup + confirm gates on destructive writes.

baseUrl.description: Base URL of the n8n instance, e.g. http://n8n.example.internal:5678

apiKey.description: n8n public API key (X-N8N-API-KEY). Leave blank and set N8N_API_KEY in the environment instead.

apiKeyEnv.description: Environment variable to read the API key from when apiKey is blank.

enableEdit.description: Enable the full workflow + execution lifecycle write tools (create, activate, deactivate, save, archive, unarchive, delete-workflow, cancel-execution, retry-execution, delete-execution, delete-executions). Off by default. Destructive tools (save, delete-workflow, delete-execution, delete-executions) are confirm-gated; save and delete-workflow snapshot to backupDir first. create accepts n8n_get_workflow output directly and is the restore path for delete-workflow snapshots.

maxExecutionLogBytes.description: Max bytes of execution log returned inline. Larger logs are truncated with a tail hint.

requestTimeoutMs.description: HTTP timeout for n8n API calls.

backupDir.description: Directory for pre-save workflow snapshots. Defaults to ~/.n8n-backups.

baseUrl.label: Base URL
baseUrl.help: Your n8n instance, e.g. http://host:5678. Container-direct IPs work fine if routable.

apiKey.label: API Key
apiKey.help: Generate in n8n Settings -> API. Use keyRef to an env var, not inline.

enableEdit.label: Enable Edit Tools
enableEdit.help: Exposes all workflow + execution lifecycle write tools. Workflows: create (accepts get-workflow output directly, strips read-only fields; primary restore path), activate, deactivate, save (confirm-gated, auto-backup), archive (reversible soft-delete; preserves id), unarchive, delete-workflow (confirm-gated, snapshot-before-delete; restore via create-workflow gets a new id). Executions: cancel, retry, delete, delete-executions (batch fan-out, confirm-gated, capped at 50 ids, idempotent on 404, 5xx aborts the batch). Prefer archive over delete-workflow for cleanup that preserves the id.

maxExecutionLogBytes.label: Max Log Bytes
maxExecutionLogBytes.help: Truncate large execution logs to keep tool responses within token budgets.
